overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic coastal path during a vibrant sunset. The character traverses a stone-walled cobblestone area, crosses a wooden bridge, and follows a winding dirt trail along grassy hills and coastal cliffs overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone-walled cobblestone path leading to wooden bridge

events.description: character begins ascending wooden stairs of the bridge structure
ground surface transitions from cobblestone to dirt trail after crossing bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path between stone walls, crossing a wooden bridge, and transitioning onto a dirt trail

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff walls flanking both sides of the path
weathered cobblestone pathway with grass growing between stones
wooden stairs and bridge crossing between the stone walls
red fabric banners mounted on poles visible in the distance
snow-capped mountain peak visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a cobblestone path enclosed by tall stone cliff walls. The character approaches and crosses a wooden bridge structure with stairs, transitioning from the enclosed stone corridor onto a more open dirt trail. Red banners mark the entrance to the bridge area, and a distant snowy mountain is visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail opening to coastal vista

events.description: goat appears on the left hillside and begins walking parallel to the path
coastal view opens up revealing the ocean on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt trail through grassy hills as the landscape opens to reveal the coastline, with a goat walking nearby

notable_agents.action: goat walking parallel to the path on the left hillside, occasionally crossing behind the character

entered.detail: narrow dirt and gravel path winding through the hills
rolling green hills covered in grass and wildflowers
brown goat walking on the hillside terrain
scattered evergreen trees on the hilltops
expansive view of the ocean becoming visible on the right
large boulders and rock outcrops along the trail

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide grassy hillside with a dirt trail winding through moderate vegetation. A goat appears on the left and walks alongside the path. As the character progresses, the landscape opens to reveal a stunning coastal view with the ocean visible on the right, while pine trees dot the hilltops ahead.

events.description: sun creates strong lens flare as character walks directly toward the setting sun over the ocean
passing large rock formations and wooden fence posts along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal trail facing the setting sun, with the ocean visible on the right side

entered.detail: bright sun sitting low on the horizon over the ocean creating warm orange and pink light
rocky cliff dropping down to the ocean water
weathered wooden posts lining the edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the coastal cliff path as the sun sets directly ahead over the ocean, creating a warm golden backlight. The trail runs along the cliff edge with wooden fence posts appearing along the path. Large rock formations line the right side while the distant snowy mountain remains visible on the left, and the goat from the previous segment is no longer in view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched coastal cliffside. It begins on a cobblestone path enclosed by tall stone walls, moving past red banners and across a wooden bridge with stairs to transition onto an open dirt trail. As the terrain shifts to a wide grassy hillside, the camera follows the path past a walking goat while the landscape expands to reveal the ocean and pine-dotted hilltops. The scene then opens further onto a cliff edge lined with wooden fence posts and large rock formations, before finally turning toward a vibrant sunset that casts a warm golden backlight over the water with a distant snowy mountain remaining visible on the horizon.
